svg.title: Godot Control MCP system context
svg.desc: An engineer or AI-enabled MCP client uses a local TypeScript control plane to direct the Godot editor, a running game, and guarded project files, with an optional external asset provider outside the workstation boundary.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SYS-ASSET-PROVIDER
Optional asset provider
feature + credential boundary

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SYS-GODOT-EDITOR-PROJECT
Godot editor + active project
authoritative editor executor

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SYS-RUNNING-GAME
Running game
authoritative runtime executor

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
ACT-ENGINEER-AI
Engineer or AI-enabled
MCP client
